parsed.explanation: I fixed structural XML tag errors while preserving the original historical text content (including encoding artifacts). Main fixes: (1) removed four stray closing </TITLE> tags that appeared in descriptive text outside title scope, (2) changed two incorrect <PRICE>...</PRICE> tags to <PRIZE>...</PRIZE> to match the rest of the schema, (3) fixed one mismatched closing tag </PRICE> to </PRIZE>, and (4) kept all BIBL blocks properly nested and closed. No spelling/normalization of historical wording was performed beyond tag repair.
